mapper.select:
select category_code, category_name as "title", id as "key", (case when is_has_child = 1 then 0 else 1 end) as isLeaf, parent_id as parentId from kol_tag_category where parent_id = #{parentId}
and ${key} = #{value}

WITH RECURSIVE cte AS ( SELECT id, category_name, parent_id FROM kol_tag_category WHERE id = #{categoryId} UNION ALL SELECT k.id, k.category_name, k.parent_id FROM kol_tag_category k INNER JOIN cte ON k.parent_id = cte.id ) SELECT * FROM cte
